[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111111 a
2 11111111 a
3 11111001 6
4 11111011 7
5 01011111 6
6 11100000 3
7 00111111 6

01 10 11110111 7

23 32 11011111 7

56 65 11111111 a match 0 1 2
67 76 10101111 6
70 07 10101111 6

24 42 01011111 6 match 5
35 53 11111101 7

57 75 11111111 a match 0 1 2

71 17 11111111 a match 0 1 2

36 63 11100110 5
47 74 00101111 5

72 27 01111111 7

37 73 11101111 7
